proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ECOG performance status (ecog_ps) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Stage IV disease (stage_iv=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-stage IV.
Older age (age_years) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Each 1-point increase in ecog_ps changes mean pfs_months by -1.190 months (p=0.00e+00).
Mean pfs_months: stage_iv=1 3.70 (n=27481) vs stage_iv=0 5.05 (n=22519); diff=-1.352, p=0.00e+00.
Each 1-year increase in age changes mean pfs_months by 0.1765 months (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Lower albumin_g_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (positive slope: higher albumin → longer PFS).
Higher weight_loss_pct_6mo is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher LDH (ldh_u_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher CRP (crp_mg_l) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher neutrophil-to-lymphocyte ratio (nlr) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher baseline CEA (cea_ng_ml) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs_months on albumin_g_dl: 0.46536 months/unit (p=3.25e-115).
Slope of pfs_months on weight_loss_pct_6mo: -0.07302 months/unit (p=2.21e-167).
Slope of pfs_months on ldh_u_l: -0.00032 months/unit (p=1.26e-02).
Slope of pfs_months on crp_mg_l: -0.00202 months/unit (p=6.50e-02).
Slope of pfs_months on nlr: 0.00522 months/unit (p=2.90e-01).
Slope of pfs_months on cea_ng_ml: -0.00535 months/unit (p=3.13e-17).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab (treatment_cetuximab) is associated with longer pfs_months overall (positive mean difference).
Bevacizumab (treatment_bevacizumab) is associated with longer pfs_months overall (positive mean difference).
Pembrolizumab (treatment_pembrolizumab) is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Encorafenib (treatment_encorafenib) is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Trastuzumab+tucatinib (treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib) is associated with longer pfs_months overall.
Regorafenib (treatment_regorafenib) is associated with shorter pfs_months overall (later-line indication).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs_months on treatment_cetuximab 4.29 (n=15078) vs off 4.32 (n=34922); diff=-0.038, p=8.80e-02.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_bevacizumab 4.30 (n=22383) vs off 4.32 (n=27617); diff=-0.019, p=3.54e-01.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_pembrolizumab 4.32 (n=7660) vs off 4.31 (n=42340); diff=0.005, p=8.56e-01.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_encorafenib 4.32 (n=5111) vs off 4.31 (n=44889); diff=0.005, p=8.73e-01.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib 4.27 (n=4033) vs off 4.32 (n=45967); diff=-0.044, p=2.44e-01.
Mean pfs_months on treatment_regorafenib 5.09 (n=10022) vs off 4.12 (n=39978); diff=0.972, p=1.71e-216.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cetuximab benefit (longer pfs_months) is restricted to or stronger in patients without KRAS, NRAS, or BRAF V600E mutations (RAS/RAF wild-type) than in patients with any of these mutations (positive interaction in WT subgroup).
Among RAS/RAF wild-type patients, cetuximab benefit (longer pfs_months) is greater in left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) than right-sided primaries.
In the KRAS-mutant subgroup, cetuximab is associated with no benefit or harm on pfs_months (mean difference ≤0).

analyses.result_summary: Cetuximab effect in WT: -0.045 mo (p=1.70e-01); in MUT: -0.034 mo (p=2.51e-01). Interaction term cetux*WT = -0.012 mo (p=7.92e-01).
In RAS/RAF WT, cetux effect on pfs_months: left-sided -0.067 mo (p=1.25e-01); right-sided -0.026 mo (p=5.86e-01). Cetux*right_sided interaction = +0.041 mo (p=5.62e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by treatment_cetuximab in KRAS-mutant subset
analyses.result_summary: In KRAS-mutant patients, cetuximab effect on pfs_months = -0.028 mo (4.10 vs 4.13, n=6257/14641, p=3.76e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Pembrolizumab benefit on pfs_months is restricted to MSI-high (msi_high=1) patients (positive interaction).
In MSI-high patients, pembrolizumab is associated with longer pfs_months than no pembrolizumab (positive mean difference).
In microsatellite-stable (msi_high=0) patients, pembrolizumab is not associated with longer pfs_months (effect ~0).

analyses.result_summary: Pembro*MSI interaction = +0.002 mo (p=9.88e-01); pembro effect MSI-high +0.007 vs MSS +0.005.

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by pembro in MSI-high subset
analyses.result_summary: MSI-high pembro effect: +0.007 mo (4.30 vs 4.29, n=396/2117, p=9.57e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by pembro in MSS subset
analyses.result_summary: MSS pembro effect: +0.005 mo (p=8.61e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Encorafenib benefit on pfs_months is restricted to BRAF V600E-mutant patients (positive interaction with braf_v600e).
In BRAF V600E-mutant patients, encorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no encorafenib (positive mean difference).
In BRAF V600E-wild-type patients, encorafenib is not associated with longer pfs_months (effect ~0).

analyses.result_summary: Encorafenib*BRAFV600E interaction = -0.141 mo (p=3.76e-01); BRAF-mut effect -0.129 vs WT +0.013.

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by encorafenib in BRAF V600E subset
analyses.result_summary: BRAF V600E-mut encorafenib effect: -0.129 mo (3.98 vs 4.11, n=242/2030, p=3.29e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by encorafenib in BRAF V600E WT subset
analyses.result_summary: BRAF V600E WT encorafenib effect: +0.013 mo (p=7.18e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Trastuzumab+tucatinib benefit on pfs_months is restricted to HER2-amplified (her2_amplified=1) patients (positive interaction).
In HER2-amplified patients, trastuzumab+tucatinib is associated with longer pfs_months (positive mean difference).
In HER2-non-amplified patients, trastuzumab+tucatinib is not associated with longer pfs_months (effect ~0).

analyses.result_summary: Trastuzumab/tucatinib*HER2 interaction = +0.063 mo (p=7.78e-01); HER2-amp effect +0.017 vs non-amp -0.046.

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by trastuzumab_tucatinib in HER2-amp subset
analyses.result_summary: HER2-amp trastuzumab/tucatinib effect: +0.017 mo (4.27 vs 4.26, n=120/1384, p=9.34e-01).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by trastuzumab_tucatinib in HER2 non-amp subset
analyses.result_summary: HER2-non-amp trastuzumab/tucatinib effect: -0.046 mo (p=2.32e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Right-sided primary (right_sided_primary=1) tumors are associated with shorter pfs_months than left-sided (negative mean difference).
Female sex (sex_female=1) is associated with longer pfs_months than male (positive mean difference).
Liver metastases (liver_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months than no liver mets (negative mean difference).

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs: right_sided_primary=1 4.11 (n=17657) vs =0 4.42 (n=32343); diff=-0.305, p=1.04e-49.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a multivariable OLS for pfs_months, ECOG performance status retains a negative coefficient after adjusting for stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, and crp_mg_l.
In the same multivariable OLS, albumin_g_dl retains a positive coefficient (higher albumin → longer PFS) after adjustment.
In the same multivariable OLS, weight_loss_pct_6mo retains a negative coefficient after adjustment.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + crp_mg_l + nlr
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for ecog_ps: -1.1790 mo/unit (p=0.00e+00).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + crp_mg_l + nlr
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for albumin_g_dl: +0.4613 mo/unit (p=0.00e+00).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + stage_iv + age_years + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + crp_mg_l + nlr
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for weight_loss_pct_6mo: -0.0755 mo/unit (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher fatigue_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher pain_nrs is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher dyspnea_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher appetite_loss_grade is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs on fatigue_grade: -0.0017 mo/grade (p=8.53e-01).
Slope of pfs on pain_nrs: -0.0023 mo/grade (p=5.47e-01).
Slope of pfs on dyspnea_grade: -0.0092 mo/grade (p=3.12e-01).
Slope of pfs on appetite_loss_grade: -0.0002 mo/grade (p=9.83e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Heart failure (heart_failure=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative mean difference).
Chronic kidney disease (chronic_kidney_disease=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
COPD (copd=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Diabetes mellitus (diabetes_mellitus=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs: heart_failure=1 4.31 vs =0 4.31; diff=+0.001, p=9.82e-01.
Mean pfs: chronic_kidney_disease=1 4.34 vs =0 4.31; diff=+0.032, p=3.14e-01.
Mean pfs: diabetes_mellitus=1 4.30 vs =0 4.31; diff=-0.013, p=6.11e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Greater prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Prior chemotherapy (prior_chemotherapy=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.
Prior surgery (prior_surgery=1) is associated with longer pfs_months (often resectable disease has better prognosis).

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs on prior_lines_of_therapy: +0.0078 mo/line (p=3.88e-01).
Mean pfs: prior_chemotherapy=1 4.31 vs =0 4.31; diff=-0.005, p=8.20e-01.
Mean pfs: prior_surgery=1 4.30 vs =0 4.32; diff=-0.023, p=2.77e-01.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Lower hemoglobin_g_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (positive slope: higher Hb → longer PFS).
Higher alkaline_phosphatase_u_l is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope; reflects liver/bone burden).
Higher total_bilirubin_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).
Higher creatinine_mg_dl is associated with shorter pfs_months (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs on hemoglobin_g_dl: -0.01009 (p=7.77e-02).
Slope of pfs on alkaline_phosphatase_u_l: -0.00059 (p=4.13e-03).
Slope of pfs on total_bilirubin_mg_dl: -0.06531 (p=4.40e-02).
Slope of pfs on creatinine_mg_dl: -0.04571 (p=1.84e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Mean pfs_months differs across race_ethnicity categories (overall ANOVA test).
Mean pfs_months differs across insurance_type categories (overall ANOVA test).
Rural residence (rural_residence=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months than non-rural.
Bone metastases (bone_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months than no bone mets.
Adrenal metastases (adrenal_mets=1) are associated with shorter pfs_months.
Pleural effusion (pleural_effusion=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Mean pfs: bone_mets=1 4.34 vs =0 4.31; diff=+0.031, p=2.25e-01.
Mean pfs: adrenal_mets=1 4.36 vs =0 4.31; diff=+0.058, p=8.88e-02.
Mean pfs: pleural_effusion=1 4.27 vs =0 4.32; diff=-0.052, p=6.88e-02.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Bevacizumab effect on pfs_months does not depend on KRAS mutation status (interaction term ~0).
Bevacizumab effect on pfs_months does not depend on right_sided_primary (interaction term ~0).
Bevacizumab is associated with longer pfs_months in both KRAS-mutant and KRAS-wild-type subgroups (broad benefit).

analyses.result_summary: Bevacizumab*KRAS interaction = -0.004 mo (p=9.15e-01).
Bevacizumab*right_sided interaction = -0.022 mo (p=6.08e-01).
Bevacizumab effect KRAS-mut -0.020 (p=4.92e-01); KRAS-WT -0.015 (p=5.88e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: At least one of the 27 SNPs (snp_rs* columns) shows a Bonferroni-significant association with pfs_months across the full cohort (additive coding 0/1/2).

analyses.result_summary: Top SNP: snp_rs1050828, slope=+0.0917 mo/allele, p=1.53e-02. 0/27 SNPs pass Bonferroni (alpha=1.85e-03).

proposed_hypotheses.text: snp_rs1801133 (MTHFR C677T) carriers show a different mean pfs_months than non-carriers (additive slope ≠ 0).
snp_rs1065852 (CYP2D6) genotype is associated with pfs_months (additive slope ≠ 0).
snp_rs4244285 (CYP2C19) genotype is associated with pfs_months (additive slope ≠ 0).

analyses.result_summary: Slope of pfs on snp_rs1801133: +0.0135 mo/allele (p=5.46e-01).
Slope of pfs on snp_rs1065852: +0.0296 mo/allele (p=3.51e-01).
Slope of pfs on snp_rs4244285: +0.0239 mo/allele (p=3.35e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Regorafenib (treatment_regorafenib=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months even after adjusting for prior_lines_of_therapy (negative coefficient).
Among patients with ≥2 prior_lines_of_therapy, regorafenib is associated with longer pfs_months than no regorafenib (positive mean difference within heavily pretreated patients).

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_regorafenib + prior_lines_of_therapy + ecog_ps + stage_iv
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted regorafenib coefficient: +0.963 mo (p=0.00e+00).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by treatment_regorafenib in heavily pretreated subset (>=2 prior lines)
analyses.result_summary: Heavily pretreated regorafenib effect: +0.990 mo (5.11 vs 4.12, n=3560/14048, p=6.25e-80).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for prognostic covariates (ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, prior_lines_of_therapy), cetuximab retains a positive coefficient on pfs_months in RAS/RAF wild-type patients.
After the same adjustment, pembrolizumab retains a positive coefficient in MSI-high patients.
After the same adjustment, encorafenib retains a positive coefficient in BRAF V600E-mutant patients.

analyses.code: OLS pfs_months ~ treatment_cetuximab + covariates (RAS/RAF WT subset)
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted cetuximab effect (WT): -0.019 mo (p=2.93e-01).
Adjusted pembrolizumab effect (MSI-H): +0.061 mo (p=2.35e-01).
Adjusted encorafenib effect (BRAF V600E): -0.002 mo (p=8.72e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: In RAS/RAF wild-type, left-sided (right_sided_primary=0) patients, cetuximab is associated with longer pfs_months (positive mean difference); the effect is the largest of any biomarker-defined cetuximab subgroup.
In RAS/RAF wild-type, right-sided patients, cetuximab effect on pfs_months is null or negative.

analyses.code: Cetuximab effect in WT-left subset (Welch t)
analyses.result_summary: Cetux effect WT-left: -0.067 mo (p=1.25e-01); WT-right -0.026, MUT-left -0.041, MUT-right -0.021.

analyses.code: Cetuximab effect in WT-right subset (Welch t)
analyses.result_summary: Cetux effect WT-right: -0.026 mo (p=5.86e-01).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among pembrolizumab-treated patients, MSI-high status (msi_high=1) is associated with substantially longer pfs_months than MSS (positive mean difference).
Among non-pembrolizumab-treated patients, MSI-high status is not associated with a meaningful pfs_months difference (effect ~0).

analyses.code: Welch t-test pfs by msi_high in pembro-treated subset
Welch t-test pfs by msi_high in non-pembro subset

proposed_hypotheses.text: BRAF V600E mutation is associated with shorter pfs_months overall (negative mean difference).
MSI-high status is associated with longer pfs_months overall (positive mean difference).
TP53 mutation (tp53_mutation=1) is associated with shorter pfs_months overall.
PIK3CA mutation is associated with shorter pfs_months overall.
Bevacizumab effect on pfs_months is similar across stage_iv and non-stage_iv (interaction term ~0; broad benefit).

In a fully adjusted multivariable model (stage_iv, ecog_ps, age, albumin, ldh, prior_lines_of_therapy, all six treatments, and major biomarkers), bevacizumab retains a positive coefficient on pfs_months.
In the same fully adjusted model, regorafenib retains a negative coefficient on pfs_months.

analyses.result_summary: Bev*stage_iv interaction = -0.004 mo (p=9.29e-01).
Adjusted bevacizumab coefficient: +0.002 mo (p=7.86e-01).
Adjusted regorafenib coefficient: +0.943 mo (p=0.00e+00).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Trastuzumab+tucatinib coefficient remains positive in HER2-amplified patients after adjustment for prognostic covariates (ecog_ps, stage_iv, age_years, albumin_g_dl, ldh_u_l, weight_loss_pct_6mo, crp_mg_l, prior_lines_of_therapy).
Cetuximab × RAS/RAF-WT × right_sided_primary: among RAS/RAF WT patients, the cetuximab × right_sided interaction is negative (cetuximab benefit attenuated/reversed in right-sided primaries).
Higher prior_lines_of_therapy is associated with shorter pfs_months even after adjusting for ecog_ps and stage_iv (negative coefficient retained).

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted trastuzumab/tucatinib effect (HER2-amp): +0.013 mo (p=8.82e-01).
Cetuximab*right_sided interaction in WT: +0.041 mo (p=5.62e-01).
Adjusted prior_lines_of_therapy slope: +0.0128 mo/line (p=1.13e-01).
